revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '{{aimai}} '''大塚古墳群'''（おおつかこふんぐん）は、 *[[埼玉県]][[川越市]]にある古墳群 → [[大塚古墳群 (埼玉県)]] *[[千葉...'
revision.text:
{{aimai}} '''大塚古墳群'''（おおつかこふんぐん）は、 *[[埼玉県]][[川越市]]にある古墳群 → [[大塚古墳群 (埼玉県)]] *[[千葉県]][[山武市]]にある古墳群 → [[大塚古墳群 (千葉県)]] *[[山梨県]][[市川三郷町]]にある古墳群 → [[大塚古墳群 (山梨県)]] *[[志段味古墳群]]に属する[[愛知県]][[名古屋市]]の古墳群 → [[大塚古墳群 (名古屋市)]] *[[熊本県]][[玉名市]]にある古墳群 → [[経塚・大塚古墳群]] *[[鹿児島県]][[肝属平野]]に所在する古墳群 → [[大塚古墳群 (鹿児島県)]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:おおつかこふんくん}} [[Category:日本の考古遺跡]] [[Category:古墳]] [[Category:群集墳]]

revision.comment: 微加筆・微修正
revision.text:
'''大塚古墳群'''（おおつかこふんぐん）は、日本の古墳群の名称。各地に同名の古墳群がある。 *[[埼玉県]][[川越市]]にある古墳群 → [[大塚古墳群 (埼玉県)]] *[[千葉県]][[山武市]]にある古墳群 → [[大塚古墳群 (千葉県)]] *[[山梨県]][[市川三郷町]]にある古墳群 → [[大塚古墳群 (山梨県)]] *[[志段味古墳群]]に属する[[愛知県]][[名古屋市]]の古墳群 → [[大塚古墳群 (名古屋市)]] *[[熊本県]][[玉名市]]にある古墳群 → [[経塚・大塚古墳群]] *[[鹿児島県]][[肝属平野]]に所在する古墳群 → [[大塚古墳群 (鹿児島県)]] {{aimai}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:おおつかこふんくん}} [[Category:日本の古墳]] [[Category:群集墳]]

revision.text:
'''大塚古墳群'''（おおつかこふんぐん）は、日本の古墳群の名称。各地に同名の古墳群がある。 *[[埼玉県]][[さいたま市]]にある古墳群 → [[大塚古墳群 (さいたま市)]] *埼玉県[[川越市]]にある古墳群 → [[南大塚古墳群]] *[[千葉県]][[山武市]]にある古墳群 → [[大塚古墳群 (千葉県)]] *[[山梨県]][[市川三郷町]]にある古墳群 → [[大塚古墳群 (山梨県)]] *[[志段味古墳群]]に属する[[愛知県]][[名古屋市]]の古墳群 → [[大塚古墳群 (名古屋市)]] *[[熊本県]][[玉名市]]にある古墳群 → [[経塚・大塚古墳群]] *[[鹿児島県]][[肝属平野]]に所在する古墳群 → [[大塚古墳群 (鹿児島県)]] {{aimai}}

'''大塚古墳群'''（おおつかこふんぐん）は、日本の[[古墳群]]の名称。各地に同名の古墳群がある。
*[[大塚古墳群 (さいたま市)]] - [[埼玉県]][[さいたま市]]にある古墳群 *[[南大塚古墳群]] - 埼玉県[[川越市]]にある古墳群 *[[大塚古墳群 (千葉県)]] - [[千葉県]][[山武市]]にある古墳群 *[[大塚古墳群 (山梨県)]] - [[山梨県]][[市川三郷町]]にある古墳群 *[[大塚古墳群 (名古屋市)]] - [[志段味古墳群]]に属する[[愛知県]][[名古屋市]]の古墳群 *[[経塚・大塚古墳群]] - [[熊本県]][[玉名市]]にある古墳群 *[[大塚古墳群 (鹿児島県)]] - [[鹿児島県]][[肝属平野]]に所在する古墳群
{{aimai}}
[[Category:日本の古墳]] [[Category:群集墳]]

Several kofun clusters with the same name exist in different regions. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Saitama City)|ja|大塚古墳群 (さいたま市)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Saitama Prefecture]], [[Saitama City]]. * {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|南大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kawagoe City]], Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cl..."
revision.text:
'''Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster''' (大塚古墳群) refers to the name of [[kofun clusters]] in Japan. Several kofun clusters with the same name exist in different regions.
* {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Saitama City)|ja|大塚古墳群 (さいたま市)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Saitama Prefecture]], [[Saitama City]]. * {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|南大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kawagoe City]], Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Sanmu)|ja|大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Chiba Prefecture]], [[Sanmu City]], including {{ill|Yamamuro Himetsuka Kofun|ja|山室姫塚古墳}}. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ichikawa Misato Town)|ja|大塚古墳群 (市川三郷町)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Yamanashi Prefecture]], [[Ichikawa Misato Town]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ōgaki)|ja|大塚古墳群 (大垣市)}} - Part of the {{ill|Fuwa Kofun Cluster|ja|不破古墳群}} in [[Gifu Prefecture]], [[Ōgaki City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Nagoya)|ja|大塚古墳群 (名古屋市)}} - Part of the {{ill|Shidami Kofun Cluster|ja|志段味古墳群}} in [[Aichi Prefecture]], [[Nagoya City]]. * {{ill|Kyōzuka-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|経塚・大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kumamoto Prefecture]], [[Tamana City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Kagoshima)|ja|大塚古墳群 (鹿児島県)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kimotsuki Plain]], [[Kagoshima Prefecture]].
== Related Topics == * [[Ōtsuka Kofun (disambiguation)]]
{{Disambiguation}}
[[Category:Kofun in Japan]] [[Category:Cluster Tombs]]

revision.comment: added [[Category:Https://ja.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=]][[ja:%E5%A4%A7%E5%A1%9A%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4]][[ja:&action=edit]] using [[Help:Gadget-HotCat|HotCat]]
revision.text:
'''Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster''' (大塚古墳群) refers to the name of [[kofun clusters]] in Japan. Several kofun clusters with the same name exist in different regions.
* {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Saitama City)|ja|大塚古墳群 (さいたま市)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Saitama Prefecture]], [[Saitama City]]. * {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|南大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kawagoe City]], Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Sanmu)|ja|大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Chiba Prefecture]], [[Sanmu City]], including {{ill|Yamamuro Himetsuka Kofun|ja|山室姫塚古墳}}. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ichikawa Misato Town)|ja|大塚古墳群 (市川三郷町)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Yamanashi Prefecture]], [[Ichikawa Misato Town]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ōgaki)|ja|大塚古墳群 (大垣市)}} - Part of the {{ill|Fuwa Kofun Cluster|ja|不破古墳群}} in [[Gifu Prefecture]], [[Ōgaki City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Nagoya)|ja|大塚古墳群 (名古屋市)}} - Part of the {{ill|Shidami Kofun Cluster|ja|志段味古墳群}} in [[Aichi Prefecture]], [[Nagoya City]]. * {{ill|Kyōzuka-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|経塚・大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kumamoto Prefecture]], [[Tamana City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Kagoshima)|ja|大塚古墳群 (鹿児島県)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kimotsuki Plain]], [[Kagoshima Prefecture]].
== Related Topics == * [[Ōtsuka Kofun (disambiguation)]]
{{Disambiguation}}
[[Category:Kofun in Japan]] [[Category:Cluster Tombs]] [[Category:Https://ja.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=]][[ja:%E5%A4%A7%E5%A1%9A%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3%E7%BE%A4]][[ja:&action=edit]]

'''Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster''' (大塚古墳群) refers to the name of [[kofun clusters]] in Japan. Several kofun clusters with the same name exist in different regions.
* {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Saitama City)|ja|大塚古墳群 (さいたま市)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Saitama Prefecture]], [[Saitama City]]. * {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|南大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kawagoe City]], Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Sanmu)|ja|大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Chiba Prefecture]], [[Sanmu City]], including {{ill|Yamamuro Himetsuka Kofun|ja|山室姫塚古墳}}. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ichikawa Misato Town)|ja|大塚古墳群 (市川三郷町)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Yamanashi Prefecture]], [[Ichikawa Misato Town]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ōgaki)|ja|大塚古墳群 (大垣市)}} - Part of the {{ill|Fuwa Kofun Cluster|ja|不破古墳群}} in [[Gifu Prefecture]], [[Ōgaki City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Nagoya)|ja|大塚古墳群 (名古屋市)}} - Part of the {{ill|Shidami Kofun Cluster|ja|志段味古墳群}} in [[Aichi Prefecture]], [[Nagoya City]]. * {{ill|Kyōzuka-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|経塚・大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kumamoto Prefecture]], [[Tamana City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Kagoshima)|ja|大塚古墳群 (鹿児島県)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kimotsuki Plain]], [[Kagoshima Prefecture]].

revision.text:
'''Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster''' (大塚古墳群) refers to the name of [[kofun clusters]] in Japan. Several kofun clusters with the same name exist in different regions.
* {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Saitama City)|ja|大塚古墳群 (さいたま市)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Saitama Prefecture]], [[Saitama City]]. * {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|南大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kawagoe City]], Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Sanmu)|ja|大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Chiba Prefecture]], [[Sanmu City]], including {{ill|Yamamuro Himetsuka Kofun|ja|山室姫塚古墳}}. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ichikawa Misato Town)|ja|大塚古墳群 (市川三郷町)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Yamanashi Prefecture]], [[Ichikawa Misato Town]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ōgaki)|ja|大塚古墳群 (大垣市)}} - Part of the {{ill|Fuwa Kofun Cluster|ja|不破古墳群}} in [[Gifu Prefecture]], [[Ōgaki City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Nagoya)|ja|大塚古墳群 (名古屋市)}} - Part of the {{ill|Shidami Kofun Cluster|ja|志段味古墳群}} in [[Aichi Prefecture]], [[Nagoya City]]. * {{ill|Kyōzuka-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|経塚・大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kumamoto Prefecture]], [[Tamana City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Kagoshima)|ja|大塚古墳群 (鹿児島県)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kimotsuki Plain]], [[Kagoshima Prefecture]].
== Related Topics == * [[Ōtsuka Kofun (disambiguation)]]
{{Disambiguation}}

'''Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster''' (大塚古墳群) refers to the name of [[kofun clusters]] in Japan. Several kofun clusters with the same name exist in different regions.
* {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Saitama City)|ja|大塚古墳群 (さいたま市)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Saitama Prefecture]], [[Saitama City]]. * {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|南大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kawagoe City]], Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Sanmu)|ja|大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Chiba Prefecture]], [[Sanmu City]], including {{ill|Yamamuro Himetsuka Kofun|ja|山室姫塚古墳}}. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ichikawa Misato Town)|ja|大塚古墳群 (市川三郷町)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Yamanashi Prefecture]], [[Ichikawa Misato Town]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ōgaki)|ja|大塚古墳群 (大垣市)}} - Part of the {{ill|Fuwa Kofun Cluster|ja|不破古墳群}} in [[Gifu Prefecture]], [[Ōgaki City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Nagoya)|ja|大塚古墳群 (名古屋市)}} - Part of the {{ill|Shidami Kofun Cluster|ja|志段味古墳群}} in [[Aichi Prefecture]], [[Nagoya City]]. * {{ill|Kyōzuka-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|経塚・大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kumamoto Prefecture]], [[Tamana City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Kagoshima)|ja|大塚古墳群 (鹿児島県)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kimotsuki Plain]], [[Kagoshima Prefecture]].
== Related Topics == * [[Ōtsuka Kofun (disambiguation)]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Kofun in Japan]] to [[Category:kkkk]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
'''Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster''' (大塚古墳群) refers to the name of [[kofun clusters]] in Japan. Several kofun clusters with the same name exist in different regions.
* {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Saitama City)|ja|大塚古墳群 (さいたま市)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Saitama Prefecture]], [[Saitama City]]. * {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|南大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kawagoe City]], Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Yamamuro Himezuka Kofun|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Sanmu)|ja|大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Chiba Prefecture]], [[Sanmu City]], including {{ill|Yamamuro Himetsuka Kofun|ja|山室姫塚古墳}}. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ichikawa Misato Town)|ja|大塚古墳群 (市川三郷町)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Yamanashi Prefecture]], [[Ichikawa Misato Town]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ōgaki)|ja|大塚古墳群 (大垣市)}} - Part of the {{ill|Fuwa Kofun Cluster|ja|不破古墳群}} in [[Gifu Prefecture]], [[Ōgaki City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Nagoya)|ja|大塚古墳群 (名古屋市)}} - Part of the {{ill|Shidami Kofun Cluster|ja|志段味古墳群}} in [[Aichi Prefecture]], [[Nagoya City]]. * {{ill|Kyōzuka-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|経塚・大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kumamoto Prefecture]], [[Tamana City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Kagoshima)|ja|大塚古墳群 (鹿児島県)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kimotsuki Plain]], [[Kagoshima Prefecture]].
== Related Topics == * [[Ōtsuka Kofun (disambiguation)]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:fixing the kk issue]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
'''Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster''' (大塚古墳群) refers to the name of [[kofun clusters]] in Japan. Several kofun clusters with the same name exist in different regions.
* {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Saitama City)|ja|大塚古墳群 (さいたま市)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Saitama Prefecture]], [[Saitama City]]. * {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|南大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kawagoe City]], Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Yamamuro Himezuka Kofun|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Sanmu)|ja|大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Chiba Prefecture]], [[Sanmu City]], including {{ill|Yamamuro Himetsuka Kofun|ja|山室姫塚古墳}}. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ichikawa Misato Town)|ja|大塚古墳群 (市川三郷町)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Yamanashi Prefecture]], [[Ichikawa Misato Town]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ōgaki)|ja|大塚古墳群 (大垣市)}} - Part of the {{ill|Fuwa Kofun Cluster|ja|不破古墳群}} in [[Gifu Prefecture]], [[Ōgaki City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Nagoya)|ja|大塚古墳群 (名古屋市)}} - Part of the {{ill|Shidami Kofun Cluster|ja|志段味古墳群}} in [[Aichi Prefecture]], [[Nagoya City]]. * {{ill|Kyōzuka-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|経塚・大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kumamoto Prefecture]], [[Tamana City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Kagoshima)|ja|大塚古墳群 (鹿児島県)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kimotsuki Plain]], [[Kagoshima Prefecture]].
== Related Topics == * [[Ōtsuka Kofun (disambiguation)]]

* {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Saitama City)|ja|大塚古墳群 (さいたま市)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Saitama Prefecture]], [[Saitama City]]. * {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|南大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kawagoe City]], Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Yamamuro Himezuka Kofun|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Sanmu)|ja|大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Chiba Prefecture]], [[Sanmu City]], including {{ill|Yamamuro Himetsuka Kofun|ja|山室姫塚古墳}}. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ichikawa Misato Town)|ja|大塚古墳群 (市川三郷町)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Yamanashi Prefecture]], [[Ichikawa Misato Town]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ōgaki)|ja|大塚古墳群 (大垣市)}} - Part of the {{ill|Fuwa Kofun Cluster|ja|不破古墳群}} in [[Gifu Prefecture]], [[Ōgaki City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Nagoya)|ja|大塚古墳群 (名古屋市)}} - Part of the {{ill|Shidami Kofun Cluster|ja|志段味古墳群}} in [[Aichi Prefecture]], [[Nagoya City]]. * {{ill|Kyōzuka-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|経塚・大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kumamoto Prefecture]], [[Tamana City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Kagoshima)|ja|大塚古墳群 (鹿児島県)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kimotsuki Plain]], [[Kagoshima Prefecture]].
== Related Topics == * [[Ōtsuka Kofun]][[Category:Kofun disambiguations]]

revision.comment: moving the kofun template to the bottom of each page
revision.text:
'''Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster''' (大塚古墳群) refers to the name of [[kofun clusters]] in Japan. Several kofun clusters with the same name exist in different regions.
* {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Saitama City)|ja|大塚古墳群 (さいたま市)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Saitama Prefecture]], [[Saitama City]]. * {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|南大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kawagoe City]], Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Yamamuro Himezuka Kofun|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Sanmu)|ja|大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Chiba Prefecture]], [[Sanmu City]], including {{ill|Yamamuro Himetsuka Kofun|ja|山室姫塚古墳}}. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ichikawa Misato Town)|ja|大塚古墳群 (市川三郷町)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Yamanashi Prefecture]], [[Ichikawa Misato Town]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ōgaki)|ja|大塚古墳群 (大垣市)}} - Part of the {{ill|Fuwa Kofun Cluster|ja|不破古墳群}} in [[Gifu Prefecture]], [[Ōgaki City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Nagoya)|ja|大塚古墳群 (名古屋市)}} - Part of the {{ill|Shidami Kofun Cluster|ja|志段味古墳群}} in [[Aichi Prefecture]], [[Nagoya City]]. * {{ill|Kyōzuka-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|経塚・大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kumamoto Prefecture]], [[Tamana City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Kagoshima)|ja|大塚古墳群 (鹿児島県)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kimotsuki Plain]], [[Kagoshima Prefecture]].
== See Also == * {{ill|8=ja|9=大塚古墳|Ōtsuka_Kofun_(disambiguation)|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun}}[[Category:Kofun disambiguations]]

'''Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster''' (大塚古墳群) refers to the name of [[kofun clusters]] in Japan. Several kofun clusters with the same name exist in different regions.
* {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Saitama City)|ja|大塚古墳群 (さいたま市)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Saitama Prefecture]], [[Saitama City]]. * {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|南大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kawagoe City]], Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Yamamuro Himezuka Kofun|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Sanmu)|ja|大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Chiba Prefecture]], [[Sanmu City]], including {{ill|Yamamuro Himetsuka Kofun|ja|山室姫塚古墳}}. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ichikawa Misato Town)|ja|大塚古墳群 (市川三郷町)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Yamanashi Prefecture]], [[Ichikawa Misato Town]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ōgaki)|ja|大塚古墳群 (大垣市)}} - Part of the {{ill|Fuwa Kofun Cluster|ja|不破古墳群}} in [[Gifu Prefecture]], [[Ōgaki City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Nagoya)|ja|大塚古墳群 (名古屋市)}} - Part of the {{ill|Shidami Kofun Cluster|ja|志段味古墳群}} in [[Aichi Prefecture]], [[Nagoya City]]. * {{ill|Kyōzuka-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|経塚・大塚古墳群}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kumamoto Prefecture]], [[Tamana City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Kagoshima)|ja|大塚古墳群 (鹿児島県)}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kimotsuki Plain]], [[Kagoshima Prefecture]]. == See Also == * {{ill|8=ja|9=大塚古墳|Ōtsuka_Kofun_(disambiguation)|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun}}[[Category:Kofun disambiguations]]

revision.text:
'''大塚古墳群'''（おおつかこふんぐん）は、日本の[[古墳群]]の名称。各地に同名の古墳群がある。
*[[大塚古墳群 (さいたま市)]] - [[埼玉県]][[さいたま市]]にある古墳群 *[[南大塚古墳群]] - 埼玉県[[川越市]]にある古墳群 *[[山室姫塚古墳|大塚古墳群]] - [[千葉県]][[山武市]]にある古墳群 *[[大塚古墳群 (市川三郷町)]] - [[山梨県]][[市川三郷町]]にある古墳群 *[[大塚古墳群 (大垣市)]] - [[不破古墳群]]に属する[[岐阜県]][[大垣市]]の古墳群 *[[大塚古墳群 (名古屋市)]] - [[志段味古墳群]]に属する[[愛知県]][[名古屋市]]の古墳群 *[[経塚・大塚古墳群]] - [[熊本県]][[玉名市]]にある古墳群 *[[大塚古墳群 (鹿児島県)]] - [[鹿児島県]][[肝属平野]]に所在する古墳群
== 関連項目 == * [[大塚古墳 (曖昧さ回避)]]
{{aimai}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおつかこふんくん}} [[Category:日本の古墳]] [[Category:群集墳]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[大塚古墳群]] to [[Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大塚古墳群]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11433996]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster''' (大塚古墳群) refers to the name of [[Kofun cluster|Kofun clusters]] in Japan. Several kofun clusters with the same name exist in different regions.
* {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Saitama City)|ja|大塚古墳群 (さいたま市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Saitama City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A kofun cluster located in [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], [[:en:Saitama City|Saitama City]]. * {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|南大塚古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kawagoe City]], Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Yamamuro Himezuka Kofun|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Sanmu)|ja|大塚古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamamuro Himezuka Kofun|qq=}} - A kofun cluster located in [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]], [[Sanmu City]], including {{ill|Yamamuro Himezuka Kofun|lt=Yamamuro Himezuka Kofun|lt=Yamamuro Himetsuka Kofun|ja|山室姫塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamamuro Himetsuka Kofun|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ichikawa Misato Town)|ja|大塚古墳群 (市川三郷町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ichikawa Misato Town)|qq=}} - A kofun cluster located in [[:en:Yamanashi Prefecture|Yamanashi Prefecture]], [[Ichikawa Misato Town]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ōgaki)|ja|大塚古墳群 (大垣市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ōgaki)|qq=|1=Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ōgaki)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65257977}} - Part of the {{ill|Fuwa Kofun Cluster|ja|不破古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuwa Kofun Cluster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], [[Ōgaki City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Nagoya)|ja|大塚古墳群 (名古屋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Nagoya)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Part of the [[:en:Shidami Kofun group|Shidami Kofun Cluster]] in [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagoya City|Nagoya City]]. * {{ill|Kyōzuka-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|経塚・大塚古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōzuka-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A kofun cluster located in [[:en:Kumamoto Prefecture|Kumamoto Prefecture]], [[Tamana City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Kagoshima)|ja|大塚古墳群 (鹿児島県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Kagoshima)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kimotsuki Plain]], [[:en:Kagoshima Prefecture|Kagoshima Prefecture]]. == See Also == * {{ill|8=ja|9=大塚古墳|Ōtsuka_Kofun_(disambiguation)|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/8=ja|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大塚古墳群]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11433996]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster''' (大塚古墳群) refers to the name of [[Kofun cluster|Kofun clusters]] in Japan. Several kofun clusters with the same name exist in different regions.
* {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Saitama City)|ja|大塚古墳群 (さいたま市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Saitama City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A kofun cluster located in [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], [[:en:Saitama City|Saitama City]]. * {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|南大塚古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|qq=}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kawagoe City]], Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Yamamuro Himezuka Kofun|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Sanmu)|ja|大塚古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamamuro Himezuka Kofun|qq=}} - A kofun cluster located in [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]], [[Sanmu City]], including {{ill|Yamamuro Himezuka Kofun|lt=Yamamuro Himezuka Kofun|lt=Yamamuro Himetsuka Kofun|ja|山室姫塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamamuro Himetsuka Kofun|qq=}}. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ichikawa Misato Town)|ja|大塚古墳群 (市川三郷町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ichikawa Misato Town)|qq=}} - A kofun cluster located in [[:en:Yamanashi Prefecture|Yamanashi Prefecture]], [[Ichikawa Misato Town]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ōgaki)|ja|大塚古墳群 (大垣市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ōgaki)|1=Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Ōgaki)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65257977}} - Part of the {{ill|Fuwa Kofun Cluster|ja|不破古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuwa Kofun Cluster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], [[Ōgaki City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Nagoya)|ja|大塚古墳群 (名古屋市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Nagoya)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Part of the [[:en:Shidami Kofun group|Shidami Kofun Cluster]] in [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagoya City|Nagoya City]]. * {{ill|Kyōzuka-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja|経塚・大塚古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōzuka-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A kofun cluster located in [[:en:Kumamoto Prefecture|Kumamoto Prefecture]], [[Tamana City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Kagoshima)|ja|大塚古墳群 (鹿児島県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Kagoshima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A kofun cluster located in [[Kimotsuki Plain]], [[:en:Kagoshima Prefecture|Kagoshima Prefecture]]. == See Also == * {{ill|8=ja|9=大塚古墳|Ōtsuka_Kofun_(disambiguation)|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/8=ja|qq=}}

A kofun cluster located in [[:en:Kumamoto Prefecture|Kumamoto Prefecture]], [[Tamana City]]. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Kagoshima)|ja|大塚古墳群 (鹿児島県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (Kagoshima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} -
